instantCash.title: Instant cash
instantCash.desc: Immediate payment: cash or bank transfer.

content.mainP1: Tired of taking hundreds of photos, posting ads and answering calls from "lookers" who never buy? Dealers make you wait weeks for a sale? We have the solution.
content.mainP2: Our car buying service operates across Warsaw and the entire metropolitan area. We are interested in vehicles manufactured between 2000 and 2026. We don't nitpick — we buy cars in any technical and visual condition.

categories.title: After collisions and accidents
categories.desc: Regardless of the extent of damage, we collect wrecked and undrivable cars.

categories.title: With engine damage
categories.desc: Seized engines, broken timing belts, drivetrain problems.

categories.title: Without valid inspection or insurance
categories.desc: We handle all formalities and provide our own free tow truck transport.

categories.title: Old and worn out
categories.desc: Models from 2000 onwards, rust and high mileage are our daily bread.

categories.title: Right-hand drive & imports
categories.desc: We buy cars with right-hand steering and without Polish plates.

categories.title: Visually neglected
categories.desc: Peeling paint or damaged interior? We'll give you a fair and honest valuation.

content.clientsDesc: Our offer is aimed at a wide range of clients. We serve:
content.quickContactDesc: Call us and receive a valuation during the conversation!

kasacja.title: Vehicle Scrapping & Dismantling
kasacja.description: Your vehicle is no longer safe to drive? We provide fully legal car scrapping. We issue all necessary documents and ensure complete legal security.
kasacja.card1Desc: We issue an official **vehicle scrapping certificate**. Based on this document, you can easily deregister your car at the office and recover money for unused insurance.
kasacja.card2Desc: Your vehicle is wrecked, broken or lacks valid inspection and insurance? No problem. We'll come with our professional tow truck and collect it from any location completely **free of charge**.
kasacja.card3Desc: We pay a fair rate for every kilogram of scrapped vehicle. Money is paid **immediately in cash** or by express bank transfer right after loading the car onto the tow truck.
kasacja.legalDesc: In compliance with the End-of-Life Vehicle Recycling Act.

process.title: How does the transaction work?
process.subtitle: It couldn't be simpler. Just 3 steps separate you from cash.
process.step1Desc: Fill in the form on the website, call or send an email. Provide basic details about your car: brand, year, engine and condition. Our free valuation is based on real market values.
process.step2Desc: We arrange a convenient time for you. We come to the specified address across the entire Warsaw metropolitan area — from large districts to small towns. Tow truck or our own transport pickup is on us and completely FREE.
process.step3Desc: On the spot we prepare a legal purchase-sale agreement. We hand you the money immediately — you decide whether you prefer safe cash in hand or an express bank transfer to your account. **For scrapping and dismantling, we issue an official dismantling certificate on the spot.**

reviews.title: Customer Reviews
reviews.subtitle: See what drivers who already trusted us have to say.
reviews.googleNote: Ratings come from the official Google Maps profile

fallback.name: Krzysztof M.
fallback.text: Fast, to the point and no haggling. They came with a tow truck for my damaged Audi A4, contract signed on the hood, cash in hand. I recommend them because I was just wasting time with other dealers.

fallback.name: Anna Szymańska
fallback.text: Very professional approach. My old Yaris didn't pass inspection and it wasn't worth repairing. The guys came, gave the deregistration certificate and cash. Everything in 30 minutes.

fallback.name: Michał W.
fallback.text: I reported my car after a crash (front end wrecked). Phone valuation, fair price. On the spot without haggling over every scratch. This is how all car buying services should work.

seo.cityTitle: Car Buying & Scrapping in {city} - Cash on the Spot
seo.cityDescription: We offer fast car buying, legal vehicle scrapping and dismantling in {city}. Licensed dismantling station, free car valuations and tow truck pickup!
seo.citySubtitle: The most popular car buying service in {city}. We buy passenger, commercial and accident-damaged vehicles.
seo.cityWhyText: Selling your car privately in {city} can take weeks. We offer an instant solution. We buy cars from individuals and companies. Whether your car is in perfect condition or ready for scrapping — we'll prepare an offer for you.
seo.cityKasacjaText: Your car is no longer roadworthy? Use our legal dismantling station. In {city} we offer free tow truck pickup and issue all necessary documents for vehicle deregistration.
seo.cityQuickContactDesc: Call us now and we'll be with you in {city} within 30 minutes!
seo.cityOpenHours: We operate 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.
seo.brandDescription: Want to sell or scrap your {brand} in {city}? We offer fast car buying, legal scrapping, our own dismantling station and free 24/7 valuations!
seo.brandSubtitle: Own a {brand}? We buy every {brand} model in {city}. Fast transaction and cash on the spot.
seo.brandHowTitle: How does selling a {brand} in {city} work?
seo.brandHowText: The process of selling your {brand} in {city} is simplified to the minimum. After phone or form submission, our representative in {city} contacts you to arrange details. We come to the location, inspect the vehicle and pay cash.
seo.brandKasacjaText: Your {brand} was in an accident or is simply old? We also offer scrapping and dismantling services in {city}.
seo.brandAllModelsText: We are interested in all {brand} models, regardless of year of manufacture and engine type.
seo.modelSubtitle: Want to sell your {brand} {model} in {city} quickly? We buy all generations and versions of this model. We guarantee a fair valuation in 15 minutes.
seo.modelChooseVersionDesc: Select a generation or year below to receive a precise online valuation.
seo.modelFactText: {brand} {model} cars have been highly trusted on the Polish used car market for years. Durable construction, high wear resistance and excellent noise insulation and safety make them a particularly sought-after commodity. We offer the best prices for them in {city} and free tow truck pickup!
seo.modelAdvantagesTitle: Advantages of selling your {brand} {model} to us
seo.modelAdvantagesDesc: Want to avoid the time-consuming process of posting ads, taking dozens of photos and negotiating with indecisive buyers? We offer a professional car buying service that lets you cash in your vehicle in just a few minutes.
seo.modelAdvZeroFormalitiesDesc: We prepare all documents. You just sign the contract on the spot in {city}.
seo.modelAdvCashDesc: We pay the full amount immediately upon collecting your {brand} {model}.
seo.modelAdvTowDesc: If your {model} isn't running, we'll pick it up with our own transport from {city} for free.

about.metaTitle: About Us - Who We Are | skupautwawa.pl
about.metaDescription: Learn more about skupautwawa.pl. We are a leader in fast car buying and legal vehicle scrapping. Discover our history, mission and values.
about.heroSubtitle: We are a leader in professional car buying and legal vehicle scrapping. Our goal is to simplify the car selling process to the absolute minimum.
about.storyTitle: Our mission is instant buyout and full legal security
about.storyP1: The skupautwawa.pl platform was created for drivers who want to sell their vehicle quickly, without unnecessary formalities, diagnostic station visits and negotiations with fussy buyers. We understand how valuable your time is, so we've simplified the entire transaction process to 15 minutes.
about.storyP2: We buy cars in any technical and visual condition — both well-maintained models ready for further driving and accident-damaged, mechanically broken or scrapping-ready vehicles. We pay cash directly upon car collection and handle all the paperwork.
about.pillar1Desc: Our appraisers approach every vehicle valuation honestly based on current market rates. You receive a fair and transparent price.
about.pillar2Desc: We operate 100% in compliance with Polish law. We issue legal purchase-sale agreements or dismantling certificates necessary for deregistration and insurance refunds.
about.pillar3Desc: We have our own modern fleet of tow trucks. If your car is broken or damaged, we'll pick it up for free directly from the specified address.
about.galleryDesc: We provide professional service at every stage — from arriving with our tow truck to a secure transaction and instant cash payment.
about.galleryImg1Desc: Our own professional fleet for safe transport of cars in any condition.
about.galleryImg2Desc: Individual approach, quick 15-minute formalities and complete customer satisfaction.
about.locationDesc: Our main operations office and customer service point is located in Warsaw. Come to us for a free, professional on-site car valuation or schedule an appointment!
about.ctaDesc: Don't wait, contact us now and receive a free online or phone valuation in 15 minutes.

privacy.p4: Nie udostępniamy danych osobom trzecim bez wyraźnej zgody klienta, chyba że wymaga tego prawo.

privacy.p7: W razie pytań dotyczących polityki prywatności prosimy o kontakt drogą mailową.
